query_title: The Story of the Weeping Camel

recommendations.title: 20,000 Days on Earth
recommendations.overview: A semi-fictionalized documentary about a day in the life of Australian musician Nick Cave's persona.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Inside the Mind of a Cat
recommendations.overview: Cat experts dive into the mind of the feline to reveal the true capabilities of the pouncing pet in this captivating and cuddly documentary.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: Have a Good Trip: Adventures in Psychedelics
recommendations.overview: Celebrities recall their most mind-bending trips via animations, reenactments and more in this comedic documentary exploring the story of psychedelics.

recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: Money Heist: The Phenomenon
recommendations.overview: A documentary on why 'Money Heist' sparked a wave of enthusiasm around the world for a lovable group of thieves and their professor.

recommendations.title: Hannah Gadsby: Nanette
recommendations.overview: The Australian comedian Hannah Gadsby is taking an anti-comedy stance in her newest special.

recommendations.title: What Happened, Miss Simone?
recommendations.overview: The film chronicles Nina Simone's journey from child piano prodigy to iconic musician and passionate activist, told in her own words.
